notes: BG BG 3.24's engineering layer names specific tools (Postgres, Datadog, GitHub, Slack, Notion, Kubernetes, React, GraphQL, Kafka in various combinations across the chapter) and concrete scenarios (named roles: staff engineer, principal, CTO, founder; named systems: order-processing pipeline, charge-webhook endpoint, cluster-controller, deployment scripts).
